latestVersion.description: The version of the most recent deployment.

observedGeneration.description: The most recent generation observed by the deployment controller.

replicas.description: Total number of non-terminated pods targeted by this deployment.

updatedReplicas.description: Total number of non-terminated pods that have the desired template spec.

availableReplicas.description: Total number of available pods targeted by this deployment.

unavailableReplicas.description: Total number of unavailable pods targeted by this deployment.

readyReplicas.description: Total number of ready pods targeted by this deployment.
